rules.rule_text:
title: HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution - Filter Added
id: 98054878-5eab-434c-85d4-72d4e5a3361b
status: test
description: 'Detects execution of EDRSilencer, a tool that abuses the Windows Filtering
  Platform (WFP) to block the outbound traffic of running EDR agents based on specific
  hardcoded filter names.

  '
references:
- https://github.com/netero1010/EDRSilencer
author: Thodoris Polyzos (@SmoothDeploy)
date: 2024-01-29
modified: 2024-01-30
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
  definition: 'Requirements: Audit Filtering Platform Policy Change needs to be enabled'
detection:
  selection:
    EventID:
    - 5441
    - 5447
    FilterName|contains: Custom Outbound Filter
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
